cc.name: Content Collector
cc.description: Automated content collection from RSS, YouTube, Reddit + AI summarization
cc.overview:
Content Collector automatically gathers articles, videos, and discussions from multiple sources across the web.

Built for a solo developer who wants to stay informed without doom-scrolling — it collects, classifies, and summarizes everything into a clean daily digest.

Runs entirely on local hardware with free APIs. No subscriptions, no cloud dependencies.

collect.title: Multi-source Collection
collect.desc: RSS feeds, YouTube channels, Reddit subs — all in one pipeline

ai.title: AI Summarization
ai.desc: Local Qwen3 14B for classification, Gemini Flash for editorial summaries

digest.title: Daily Digest
digest.desc: Automated HTML report with categorized content, delivered daily

alerts.title: Telegram Alerts
alerts.desc: Real-time error notifications and collection status updates

zeroCost.title: Zero Cost
zeroCost.desc: Runs on local hardware with free APIs — no monthly fees

pipeline.title: Automated Pipeline
pipeline.desc: LaunchAgent schedules collection every 30 minutes, hands-free
